projectDescription: A serverless web service that converts HTML documents to PDF files using AWS API Gateway, AWS Lambda, Puppeteer, and Chromium.
keyFeatures: Convert any HTML document to a PDF file via a simple POST request
Serverless deployment using AWS API Gateway and AWS Lambda
Powered by Puppeteer and headless Chromium (v122)
Support for large PDF responses via gzip compression or S3 redirect
Configurable Puppeteer PDF options (page size, margins, etc.)
Optional source tagging for request identification and logging
Lambda Layer architecture for efficient Chromium bundling
publicApiSurface: POST /print — generate a PDF from an HTML document
GET /service/version — read service metadata and version
Request body: html (required string), source (optional string), settings (optional Puppeteer PDF options object)
